title: Mid-Semester Test
content: The mid-semester test for all 200-level students is scheduled for this week. Please review all course materials.

title: Course Registration
content: Course registration for the next semester is now open. Register before the deadline.

title: Departmental Meeting
content: All students are required to attend the departmental meeting on this date.

title: Exam Schedule Released
content: The official exam timetable for end-of-semester exams has been released.

title: Student ID Renewal
content: Students with expired IDs should report to the student affairs office for renewal.
